name: Fold West
explanation: A West-Coast complex-oscillator wavefolder in the Serge modular lineage. Instead of subtracting harmonics with a filter, it adds them by folding: a sine/triangle core (morphed by Timbre) is driven into a smooth wavefolder whose depth blooms with an envelope, so a held note grows brighter and more metallic then settles - the classic Buchla/Serge 'timbre from folding' movement. A gentle low-pass tames the top. 6-voice poly. Controls: Fold (fold depth), Timbre (sine to triangle), Cutoff, Env (fold-bloom amount), Decay and Level.
